name: pr_cep_acc_drain_insdel_event
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: D-160 CONTROL: same-epoch action-INSERT + delete of an evented acc member fires the net-zero W:0 on BOTH sides via the event insert's force-flush (the fold materializes at the insert's per-arrival flush, so the delete is a real fold-out, not an annihilation). Pins that INSERTS stay call-time (never queue as drain entries).
